name: styling
description: Vault appearance — Baseline theme + Style Settings canonical config. Vendors Baseline theme files; declares Style Settings community plugin as a prerequisite (not vendored). Three new installer helpers (applyVendoredThemes, applyAppearance, applyStyleSettings) mirror the v0.1.3 plugin-data automation posture: additive merge, backup-on-edit, malformed-JSON guard, failure-loud history.
